title: SSTO / Hypersonic Spaceplane Problem Statement
description: Define the problem context, mission need, and governing uncertainties for a reusable integrated airframe-propulsion spaceplane architecture supporting either hypersonic point-to-point transport or single-stage-to-orbit ascent, with runway take-off and landing, combined-cycle atmospheric propulsion, and rocket propulsion using LH2/LOX in exo-atmospheric phases.
notes: Waverider-derived integrated airframe; metallic or CMC TPS; Mach 0-25+ envelope; forebody shock pre-compression feeding inlet; cryogenic tanks coupled to thermal management.
